svg.title: swift-litellm architecture
svg.desc: Native Swift apps call LiteLLMClient, which routes model aliases through normalized providers to OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic, Gemini, and Ollama models.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: A tiny model router for native Swift apps
